frontmatter.title: Find One Missing Number in a Range
frontmatter.description: Given an array containing n distinct integers in the range [0, n], one number is missing from the array. Find the missing number.

frontmatter.title: Count the Number of Set Bits for Every Number from 0 to n
frontmatter.description: Given a number n, count the number of 1's in the binary representation of each number from 0 to n.

frontmatter.title: Check if Duplicate Element Exists in an Array
frontmatter.description: Given an array of integers, check if the array contains any duplicates.

frontmatter.title: Print Matrix in Spiral Order
frontmatter.description: Given a matrix, print all elements in spiral order.

frontmatter.title: Find all the Pairs with Given Sum
frontmatter.description: Given a list of integers, find all pairs with given sum.

frontmatter.title: Find Combinations of a List Whose Sum is Equal to a Target
frontmatter.description: Given a list of distinct integers, find all the possible combinations which sums up to a target.

frontmatter.title: Generate Spiral Matrix
frontmatter.description: Given a positive integer n, generate a square matrix filled with elements from 1 to n^2 in spiral order.

frontmatter.title: Minimum Remove to Make Valid Parentheses
frontmatter.description: Given a string, remove minimum number of parentheses to make it balanced.
